# ezfind

> ezfind connects people in Israel with top local service providers. The first
> service is private chefs (Hebrew: שף פרטי): you tell us about your event and we
> match you with private chefs in your area — free and with no obligation. The
> site is Hebrew-first (RTL).

## Private chef service (שף פרטי)

- How it works: fill a short form about your event → up to 3 vetted private chefs
  contact you with a tailored quote → you compare and choose. Free, no obligation.
  If you don't close, ezfind keeps searching until there's a precise match.
- Coverage: private chefs across Israel, including Tel Aviv, Jerusalem, Haifa,
  Rishon LeZion, Petah Tikva, Netanya, Be'er Sheva, Herzliya, Ramat Gan, Ra'anana,
  Kfar Saba, Ashdod, Modi'in, Eilat and Caesarea.
- Typical price: about ₪130–₪550 per guest, depending on the city, the menu and
  the number of guests.
- Occasions: birthdays, anniversaries, romantic dinners, business events and
  family gatherings. Kosher menus (kosher private chef / שף פרטי כשר) are available.

## Key pages

- Find a private chef (landing): https://ezfind.app/chefs
- Start a request (lead form): https://ezfind.app/find-a-chef
- How it works: https://ezfind.app/how-it-works
- FAQ: https://ezfind.app/faq
- City pages (Hebrew, canonical), e.g.: https://ezfind.app/שף-פרטי/תל-אביב
- Kosher city pages, e.g.: https://ezfind.app/שף-פרטי-כשר/ירושלים
- Full list of pages: https://ezfind.app/sitemap.xml

## For professionals

- Join the ezfind network to receive client leads: https://ezfind.app/
